channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Maryland Bans Surveillance Pricing, Ending Personalised Price Hikes
item.description: Maryland lawmakers have recently approved a landmark bill banning surveillance pricing, a practice in which retailers adjust prices individually based on a shopper's personal data, purchasing history,...

item.title: Tanzania balances foreign investment push with stricter mining licence enforcement under Dira 2050
item.description: This article discusses how Tanzania is currently sending two strong signals to investors as it advances its Dira 2050 development agenda. On one side, the government is actively inviting foreign capit...

item.title: Teck Resources expects rising costs due to Middle East conflict
item.description: Teck Resources Ltd., based in Vancouver, has warned that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East could lead to increased energy costs at its operations in Chile. The company operates the Quebrada Blan...

item.title: East African Nations Coordinate Preparations for AFCON 2027
item.description: On April 23, 2026, CAF Secretary General Samson Adamu meet top government and football officials from Tanzania, Kenya, and Uganda in Kampala, Uganda to check how preparations for AFCON 2027 dey go. At...

item.title: Toronto police confiscate SMS devices linked to cybercrime activities
item.description: Toronto police recently seized multiple SMS blaster devices as part of an ongoing investigation into cybercrime in Canada. SMS blasters are tools capable of sending massive volumes of text messages au...

item.title: How war memes reshape public understanding of conflict in the age of social media
item.description: The article examines how war‑related memes have become a dominant way to share, frame, and experience modern conflicts online. From jokes about conscription and Bluetooth‑equipped drafts to viral tune...

item.title: Ten People Injured in Shooting at Mall of Louisiana, Police Searching for Suspect
item.description: A shooting incident occurred at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge on Thursday, resulting in at least ten people being injured. According to local police reports, the altercation appears to have sta...

item.title: NDIS Changes Announced: Eligibility, Support Programs, and Fraud Prevention Explained
item.description: The Australian government has announced significant changes to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), potentially affecting up to 160,000 participants by 2030. The key change involves shifti...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh Reports Exceptional Wheat Yield; Government Boosts Procurement Efforts
item.description: The state of Madhya Pradesh has reportedly achieved a bumper wheat harvest this season, prompting the central government to enhance its procurement operations. Farmers across the region have benefited...

item.title: Philippines Ready to Host ASEAN 2026 Summit in Cebu
item.description: Malacañang has confirmed that the Philippines is fully prepared to host the ASEAN 2026 Summit in Cebu next month. Executive Secretary Ralph Recto, chair of the National Organizing Committee, provided ...

item.title: Remains of Canadian woman killed in Teotihuacan shooting returned to family after planned attack
item.description: Mexican authorities have confirmed that the body of a Canadian tourist killed during a shooting at the Teotihuacan pyramids has been returned to her family. The victim was identified as 29-year-old De...

item.title: Tanzania faces critical shortage of anaesthesia specialists, impacting safe surgeries
item.description: Tanzania is grappling with a severe shortage of anaesthesia and sedation specialists, a gap that threatens the safety of surgical procedures across the country. While each health centre is expected to...

item.title: California Reports Increase in Dangerous Snake Bites with Third Case Confirmed
item.description: Authorities in California have reported a noticeable increase in venomous snake bites across the state, with recent news confirming a third victim. Experts attribute this rise to a combination of warm...

item.title: Tanzania’s Amali Pilot Program: A New Approach to Vocational Education in Secondary Schools
item.description: In a significant move to revamp secondary education in Tanzania, the Amali pilot program is reshaping how students engage with learning. Implemented at Msangano Secondary School, the program blends tr...

item.title: BBC discontinues Football Focus after 52 years due to changing viewer habits
item.description: The BBC has announced the end of its long-running programme Football Focus after 52 years on air. The decision follows extensive consideration by BBC Sport, which cited shifting audience behaviours as...

item.title: Samia announces investigations, victim support, and reconciliation plan after October 29 violence
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has announced six immediate actions that the Tanzanian government will implement following the election-related violence that happened on October 29, 2025. Speaking at St...

item.title: Bauchi Governor Bala Mohammed Signals Political Realignment Amid Talks with Peter Obi
item.description: Governor Bala Mohammed of Bauchi State don talk say him no dey strictly align with any political party again, as him describe himself as a “freelance politician.” Him make this statement when him host...

item.title: Union Cup semifinals set stage for possible major Tanzanian derby final
item.description: The Union Cup is heading into a very decisive stage as semifinal matches promise strong competition and possible high-profile derby clashes in the final. Attention is focused on the first semifinal sc...

item.title: Mother faces charges after her unlicensed teenage son critically injures 81-year-old Vietnam veteran on e-motorcycle
item.description: In Lake Forest, California, an 81-year-old Vietnam veteran and substitute teacher, Ed Ashman, was critically injured by a teenager riding an e-motorcycle. The teen, whose mother had previously been wa...

item.title: Spotlight: New film releases and movie highlights this week
item.description: This week’s Spotlight offers a roundup of notable new film releases and entertainment highlights across South Africa. At cinemas now, 'Mother Mary' presents a bold, haunting story about a pop star con...
